name: motion-transition-panel
title: Transition Panel
author: Motion Primitives
description: Transitions between caller-provided panels by active index.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Rendered only the active panel with animation props disabled and a zero-duration transition when reduced motion is requested.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import and added an instant active-panel reduced-motion branch.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper and keep inactive panels out of the rendered focus order without enter or exit motion.
